description:
You are a cloud-architect who has just copied a 3-day migration log set to your workstation at  

    /home/user/cloud_migration/logs  

The goal is to prepare a concise report—using only standard GNU command–line utilities, **with the core
text extraction accomplished by awk and sed**—so that your management portal can ingest it automatically.

1. Input data that already exists
   • /home/user/cloud_migration/logs/2023-10-01.log  
   • /home/user/cloud_migration/logs/2023-10-02.log  
   • /home/user/cloud_migration/logs/2023-10-03.log  

   Every log line follows this exact pattern (single space delimited, no brackets):  
        YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ serviceName MIGRATE RESULT [free-form message]  

   where RESULT is one of the three literal tokens START, SUCCESS or FAIL.  
   The optional 4th column (shown only on FAIL lines) starts with the word “Error:” and may contain spaces.

2. What you must create
   a. Summary CSV
      Path: /home/user/cloud_migration/migration_summary.csv  
      Exact format (including header row, commas, NO extra spaces, Unix newlines \n):

          Service,Total_Attempts,Successes,Failures
          serviceA,3,3,0
          serviceB,3,1,2
          serviceC,3,2,1

      • The services must be sorted alphabetically (case-sensitive, a→z).  
      • “Total_Attempts” is the count of “START” rows for that service.  
      • “Successes” is the count of “SUCCESS” rows for that service.  
      • “Failures”  is the count of “FAIL” rows for that service.

   b. Failure detail list  
      Path: /home/user/cloud_migration/failed_migrations.list  
      Content: every original “MIGRATE FAIL …” line taken verbatim from all three log files,
               preserved in ascending chronological order, **no header row**.

   c. (Bonus, not graded but good practice) A helper file at
         /home/user/cloud_migration/logs/combined_success.log
      containing only the lines that end with “MIGRATE SUCCESS”.

3. Mandatory tooling restrictions
   • All extractions, counting and formatting that produce the two graded files **must** rely on awk and/or sed
     for the core text processing.  
   • You may of course pipeline those with other standard utilities (sort, uniq, tee, etc.).  
   • Do not hard-code any of the numeric answers—derive them from the logs.

4. Verification notes
   • The automated checker will compare your two graded files **byte-for-byte** to the reference answers.
   • Pay close attention to case, commas, line order and the presence/absence of trailing whitespace.
   • Create any parent directories that do not already exist; you have write permission in /home/user.

When you are finished, the only deliverables that will be tested are:

    /home/user/cloud_migration/migration_summary.csv
    /home/user/cloud_migration/failed_migrations.list

Work entirely in your terminal session; no manual file editing utilities like nano/vi are required.  
Good luck!
truth:
Pre-populated files, present before the agent starts:

1. /home/user/cloud_migration/logs/2023-10-01.log
   2023-10-01T12:00:00Z serviceA MIGRATE START
   2023-10-01T12:05:00Z serviceA MIGRATE SUCCESS
   2023-10-01T13:00:00Z serviceB MIGRATE START
   2023-10-01T13:03:00Z serviceB MIGRATE FAIL Error: Disk quota exceeded
   2023-10-01T14:00:00Z serviceC MIGRATE START
   2023-10-01T14:04:00Z serviceC MIGRATE SUCCESS

2. /home/user/cloud_migration/logs/2023-10-02.log
   2023-10-02T09:00:00Z serviceA MIGRATE START
   2023-10-02T09:04:30Z serviceA MIGRATE SUCCESS
   2023-10-02T10:00:10Z serviceB MIGRATE START
   2023-10-02T10:05:00Z serviceB MIGRATE FAIL Error: Network unreachable
   2023-10-02T11:00:00Z serviceC MIGRATE START
   2023-10-02T11:05:40Z serviceC MIGRATE SUCCESS

3. /home/user/cloud_migration/logs/2023-10-03.log
   2023-10-03T15:00:00Z serviceA MIGRATE START
   2023-10-03T15:07:00Z serviceA MIGRATE SUCCESS
   2023-10-03T16:00:00Z serviceB MIGRATE START
   2023-10-03T16:09:15Z serviceB MIGRATE SUCCESS
   2023-10-03T17:00:00Z serviceC MIGRATE START
   2023-10-03T17:08:50Z serviceC MIGRATE FAIL Error: Timeout contacting datastore

Expected deliverables generated by the agent:

A. /home/user/cloud_migration/migration_summary.csv
   Service,Total_Attempts,Successes,Failures
   serviceA,3,3,0
   serviceB,3,1,2
   serviceC,3,2,1

B. /home/user/cloud_migration/failed_migrations.list
   2023-10-01T13:03:00Z serviceB MIGRATE FAIL Error: Disk quota exceeded
   2023-10-02T10:05:00Z serviceB MIGRATE FAIL Error: Network unreachable
   2023-10-03T17:08:50Z serviceC MIGRATE FAIL Error: Timeout contacting datastore
